strings.name: UZMappers
strings.description: YouthMappers chapter at University of Zimbabwe
strings.extendedDescription: UzMappersTeam Zimbabwe is a team of Volunteers using OpenStreetMap for Open Data Mapping and Humanitarian Disaster response mapping .The team empowers its members with open source geospatial technology skills.
